replies.msg:
當你第一file要rename做ABC
第二個file要rename做TQWTW, etc...

names = [ "ABC", TQWTW", "XYS" ]

i = 0
path = "C:/python/download/ws_answer/"
lists = os.listdir(path)
for list in lists:
    old_file = path + list
    new_file = path + names[i] + ".doc"
    os.rename(old_file, new_file)
    i += 1

咁就會順住上面個names既index一直loop到尾
但係兩邊dimensions (number of files and number of new names) 要相等

replies.msg:
如果你兩個array嘅長度相同，應該用zip:

for name, path in zip(names, lists):
...

如果想個i當係string放係個file name可以點做
例如 file1.txt; file2.txt

quote.msg: 搞掂，多謝各位巴打

如果你兩個array嘅長度相同，應該用zip:

...

如果想個i當係string放係個file name可以點做

搞掂，多謝各位巴打

如果你兩個array嘅長度相同，應該用zip:

for name, path in zip(names, lists):
...

如果想個i當係string放係個file name可以點做
例如 file1.txt; file2.txt

replies.msg:
如果你喺問緊點攞返個index，用enumerate:

for num, (name, path) in enumerate(zip(names, lists),1): ...

如果你問緊點format int to string，有人已經講咗點用string formatting，但Python 3仲可以用f string:

f”{name}{num}”.txt

quote.msg:
如果你兩個array嘅長度相同，應該用zip:

for name, path in zip(names, lists):
...

如果想個i當係string放係個file name可以點做
例如 file1.txt; file2.txt

如果你喺問緊點攞返個index，用enumerate:

for num, (name, path) in enumerate(zip(names, lists),1): ...

如果你問緊點format int to string，有人已經講咗點用string formatting，但Python 3仲可以用f string:

f”{name}{num}”.txt
